response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of polyglot full-stack experience that clearly exceeds the 6-year threshold, with direct hits on the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and meaningful cloud/containerization exposure (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes). His current role at re:cinq includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, which directly addresses the AI agent development requirement. The main gaps are absence of Nest.js, no explicit mention of Vitest/Jest/Playwright in a test-framework context despite strong TDD credentials, no Python, and limited Kotlin/Java depth — these are learnable gaps for someone with his breadth, but worth probing.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js proficiency across multiple production roles (Optilyz, RIDE, re:cinq), directly matching the primary stack
Hands-on AI agent and MCP tooling experience at re:cinq, satisfying the increasingly critical AI agent development requirement
Proven TDD discipline and testing culture advocacy (Fluent-Asserts library, Trial test runner, public workshops) signal strong code quality instincts
concerns: No mention of Nest.js despite it being the primary backend framework; unclear whether prior Node.js work followed similar patterns
Kotlin and Python are absent from the resume, leaving the secondary language requirements (Kotlin/Java backend services, Python) largely unaddressed
No explicit PostgreSQL experience listed; database exposure skews toward MongoDB and MySQL, with no evidence of complex relational schema work
